title: Anti-Freecam
description: This mod makes it so if a player has a freecam mod installed, they will be kicked
body:
This mod detects if a player is using a freecam mod and kicks them from the server until they remove it! 

The only known undetectable freecam mods are

https://modrinth.com/mod/freecammc

and https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-freecam

we are actively working on making these mods detectable!

WARNING!
we collect anyomous data that allows us to see what versions should be supported!
there is an opt-out for this in the config if you do not want this data to be sent to us!

Our current road map:

Become open source

Make all freecam mods detectable
